SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF YING WANG IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY HER DAUGHTER SHIRLEY WANG WITH MANDARIN INTERPRETATION. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WINNIE NG, BRANCH MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, YING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
